data.name: CyberPunk SEX Tower
data.detailed_description:
The world of the future, modern technologies make it possible to create a super realistic sexual experience ...

You are in the middle of a metropolis in a building that is a place of entertainment.
This place is full of sin, debauchery and perverse sexual dreams.

Enter the room and activate the sexual experience.

You are in experience, she is beside you, hot, ready for your command.
She can really do a lot of pleasure. Remember that there are too
other rooms in this building, visit them. Search well and you will also find a place where the girls play with each other.

The game was created for virtual reality technology in the highest possible quality, therefore,
after starting the game, please be patient, because the game loads about one minute.

Features:

- Massive Cumshots
- Room with sexual experience
- Sex with super realistic girls
- Cyberpunk atmosphere

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 荷蘭文, 印尼語, 日文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 匈牙利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (or equivalent)
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
